title: The Patriot Phan Boi Chau
summary: Phan Boi Chau was the initiator of the Dong Du movement, sending patriotic youth to Japan to study and return to save the country.

slides.text: Phan Boi Chau believed that to gain independence, one must have knowledge. He sought ways to go to progressive countries to learn.
slides.imagePrompt: Phan Boi Chau studying in a library with modern books, looking thoughtful, traditional scholar outfit, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He founded the Dong Du movement, encouraging youth to study abroad in Japan to hone their talents.
slides.imagePrompt: Young Vietnamese students on a boat traveling to Japan, Phan Boi Chau waving goodbye, hope and ambition, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Despite facing many difficulties, Phan Boi Chau never stopped writing books and poems to awaken the national spirit.
slides.imagePrompt: Phan Boi Chau writing patriotic poems by candlelight, glowing words in the air, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He was a great patriot who laid the first bricks for the modern journey of seeking national salvation.
slides.imagePrompt: Portrait of Phan Boi Chau with symbols of education and books, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which movement did Phan Boi Chau initiate?
Which country did he send patriotic youth to for studying?
